descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-4 to win Abbott Cup 4-3 series, advancing to Centennial Cup.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-4 in Game 7 of the Abbott Cup Western Canadian junior-A championship series, winning 4-3. As B.C. champions, the Sockeyes have now eliminated Nanaimo, Delta, Kelowna, and Red Deer. The Broncos, as Centennial Cup hosts in Humboldt, will face Richmond again starting Saturday in the Canadian championship tournament.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Add Humboldt Broncos to Hit List
